prompt:
Evidence events follow as JSON (id, kind, observed_at, text). Return JSON with keys: "score" (0..1), "trend" (-1..1), "confidence" (0..1, how well the evidence supports the score), "evidence_event_ids" (ids you relied on — ONLY ids from the provided list), "rationale" (one paragraph).

CALIBRATION — use the full range, and give TWO DECIMALS:
  0.00-0.20  the evidence actively argues against this axis
  0.20-0.40  little support, or only the company's own claims about itself
  0.40-0.60  genuinely mixed or ambiguous evidence
  0.60-0.80  clear support corroborated outside the company
  0.80-1.00  exceptional and multiply corroborated — rare, most companies are not here
Do not round to the nearest 0.1. 0.62 and 0.71 are different answers and that difference is the entire point of the axis.

trend is a DIRECTION, not a rate: the SIGN says whether this axis is improving (+) or deteriorating (-) across the observed_at window, and the magnitude within 0..1 says how pronounced that direction is. Use 0.0 when the evidence is flat or too short to establish a direction. Do not default to +1 — reserve it for a direction that is unambiguous across the whole window.

Thin or missing evidence means LOW CONFIDENCE. It does not mean a low score and it does not mean a middling score — report what the evidence you have actually supports, and let confidence carry how little of it there is.

<untrusted_content>
[{"event_id": "5c1f322f-6fb0-54f4-b659-3cd0df7c791d", "kind": "repo_activity", "observed_at": "2025-05-27T22:09:03.111928+00:00", "text": "commit 6b0a3fd \"dedupe on (tenant, idempotency_key); double-billing is unrecoverable trust damage\""}, {"event_id": "5b1c0a73-a1f1-5e05-b339-3f5e7c034aaf", "kind": "green_flag", "observed_at": "2025-06-01T00:00:00+00:00", "text": "1/24 applicable green flags fired"}, {"event_id": "49d4f622-7d40-598d-9a77-e0812e41690a", "kind": "hn_comment", "observed_at": "2025-11-27T05:34:03.111928+00:00", "text": "\"Tallwind is pre-revenue right now. Four design partners, no billing turned on, planning to charge from Q1.\""}, {"event_id": "7696e0b7-bda4-54ed-ab45-cb67460febee", "kind": "green_flag", "observed_at": "2025-12-01T00:00:00+00:00", "text": "0/27 applicable green flags fired"}, {"event_id": "faed3433-0ae7-5b1f-8ba3-03400c2bae53", "kind": "release", "observed_at": "2025-12-17T00:09:03.111928+00:00", "text": "v0.4.0 \u2014 \"metering reconciliation report; the number you bill is now provable from raw events\""}, {"event_id": "3ec8d9f4-9357-5ab0-8d40-28c9857da2d3", "kind": "green_flag", "observed_at": "2025-12-17T00:09:03.111928+00:00", "text": "v0.4.0 \u2014 \"metering reconciliation report; the number you bill is now provable from raw events\""}, {"event_id": "f408ba0c-62a4-5f99-85f2-1c374a40f381", "kind": "green_flag", "observed_at": "2025-12-17T00:09:03.111928+00:00", "text": "commit 6b0a3fd \"dedupe on (tenant, idempotency_key); double-billing is unrecoverable trust damage\""}, {"event_id": "871520b1-c55b-56e1-b06d-c4025eff61b1", "kind": "green_flag", "observed_at": "2025-12-17T00:09:03.111928+00:00", "text": "v0.4.0 \u2014 \"metering reconciliation report; the number you bill is now provable from raw events\""}, {"event_id": "c286bd7b-7ec5-53ea-a758-92a24ac33fc6", "kind": "green_flag", "observed_at": "2026-01-01T00:00:00+00:00", "text": "4/27 applicable green flags fired"}]
</untrusted_content>

The release of version 0.4.0, which includes features aimed at billing accuracy, suggests some product development aimed at addressing customer needs. However, the lack of billing and the mixed results of green flags indicate that while there is some activity and potential interest, the actual market pull is still uncertain and not fully realized."
